title: Riggotts
description: riggott.co.uk zoominfo.com/c/riggotts--co-ltd/345701355 Riggotts (Riggott and Company Limited) is one of the UK's leading line marking and surface coating contractors, founded on 2 November 1994 by brothers Nick and Darren Riggott. Headquartered in Tuxford, Newark, Nottinghamshire, the company has grown to operate more than 50 specialist teams working 24/7 across the entire United Kingdom. Estimated annual turnover stands at approximately 8 million
